content.en:
The white-bearded old man didn't answer, but drank a cup of tea first, and then asked, "Do you know how the ancient leaves of time and space came from?"

"I don't know. "

Ye Tian shook his head.

How did the Ancient Leaf of Time and Space come about, I'm afraid not only he doesn't know, but many Legendary Realm Lords probably don't know, of course, if the Legendary Realm Lord inquires with all his might, he can also inquire.

However, the Legendary Realm Lord will not go to find any space-time ancient leaves, because he knows too little, unless it is useful for condensing the Supreme Legendary Body, it is not very clear.

If it weren't for the Supreme Legend's need for the Ancient Leaves of Time and Space, even the Ancient Leaves of Time and Space would not be so precious.

The white-bearded old man introduced: "The Ancient Leaves of Time and Space come from the Ancient Tree of Time and Space, and we can't see the Ancient Tree of Time and Space, but the Eternal Controller can. When the Eternal Master tries to jump the timeline, go back in time, or enter the future, the moment the timeline jumps, they see an ancient tree of time and space across the past and the future, and then they can pick a leaf of time and space. In other words, the Ancient Leaves of Time and Space are treasures that only the Eternal Masters can pick. Perhaps for the Yong 08 Heng masters, it is just an ordinary leaf, and it is easy to get their hands on. But for the Legendary Realm Lord, it is a legendary thing within legends, and there is no way to get it, or even to obtain it. I have a good relationship with three Eternal Masters, and one of them mentioned the Plane Tree to me and gave me an Ancient Plane Leaf. Now, you know what it's worth. "

Ye Tian knew that the Ancient Leaves of Time and Space were so precious, if he went to look for them, there would be no news about searching for hundreds of millions of eternal years.

However, the white-bearded old man did not refuse at the first time, and there must be hope.

"Old man with white beard, if I want to obtain the Ancient Leaves of Time and Space, how can I get them?"

Ye Tian asked sincerely.

"After passing my assessment, I will give you a piece of Ancient Leaves of Time and Space. "

The white-bearded old man promised.

"Please ask the white-bearded old man to lower the assessment. "

Ye Tian hurriedly said.

The white-bearded old man pondered for a moment and said, "My assessment is only one, that is, to kill the incarnation of a half-step Legendary Realm Lord, it must be killed by Zhengda Light, and without the help of other people's strength, kill it with your own strength." "

"What, kill the half-step Legendary Realm Lord"

Ye Tian was shocked.

It's too difficult, isn't it?

He has now reached the limit of his strength, but it is only comparable to a half-step Legendary Realm Lord, comparable to and killing are two difficulties, similar to the combat power of the Frostless Lord when he is a half-step Legendary Realm Lord, he can kill an ordinary half-step Legendary Realm Lord!

And how can he kill it?

"Do you think I'm embarrassing you?

The white-bearded old man smiled.

"Nope. "

Ye Tian replied, but he really felt that the white-bearded old man was embarrassing him, and the store didn't want to give it, so he could say it truthfully, there was no need to do it in this way.

At this time, the white-bearded old man said with a smile: "I know that you have created many top-notch legendary eternal skills, but there is also a supreme eternal technique on top of the legendary eternal technique, which can also be referred to as the supreme technique, if you create a supreme skill, it is still not difficult to kill an ordinary half-step legendary realm." You're in complete control of time, and while you're still a long way from creating your supreme skill, it's not hopeless. There are a lot of Peak Legendary Realm Lords who want to get the Ancient Leaves of Time and Space from me, and even one Peak Legendary Realm Lord has taken out a treasure that is enough to make other Peak Legendary Realm Lords excited, but I still haven't given it. If you want to obtain the Ancient Leaves of Time and Space, if you can easily get them, then how is it possible?"

"I see, thank you for the white beard.

Ye Tian said.

"Leave, wait until you kill an ordinary Legendary Realm Lord, and then come back to me. "

As soon as the white-bearded old man waved his hand, Ye Tian left Xuyang Mountain, and even left Yongyang Sea, and returned directly to the Infinite Sea.

"What a terrifying strength. "

Ye Tian was shocked.

This time I met the white-bearded old man, although I didn't get the ancient leaves of time and space, but I saw hope.

There is no holy place.

Ye Tian came to visit the Frostless Lord.

"Endless Lord, have you seen the Whitebeard Old Man?" asked the Frostless Lord.

"See!"

Ye Tian nodded.

"You didn't get the Ancient Leaves of Time and Space, did you?" said the Frostless Lord.

"It's normal, too. "Frostless Lord Dao: There are many peak Legendary Realm lords who have a good relationship with the white-bearded old man, and they want to condense the supreme legendary body for their descendants, but they are all rejected by the white-bearded old man. "

At this time, Ye Tian said again: "The white-bearded old man said that as long as I complete an assessment, I can obtain the space-time ancient leaf billion."

"Assessment? The white-bearded old man actually gave you a chance, it's really strange, what kind of assessment?"

The Frostless Lord was a little curious.

"Kill a half-step Legendary Realm Lord.

Ye Tian said.

"This ......," the frostless lord showed a strange look, "if you want to kill a half-step Legendary Realm Lord, you must step into the Transcendental Realm Legendary Lord, and you will not be able to do it after a while of cultivation." But if you attack the Legendary Lord of the Transcendence Realm, then you don't need the Ancient Leaves of Time and Space, and the old man with the white beard will definitely not allow this to happen. "

"I know. Ye Tian said: "If I cheat like this and catch the loophole of the white-bearded old man's speech, I am afraid that not only will I not get the ancient leaves of time and space, but I will also offend the white-bearded old man, so I can only do what he asks, that is, to create a supreme technology."

"Creating a supreme ???"

The Frostless Lord gasped and said, "Do you know the difficulty of creating a supreme technique, among the half of the Legendary Realm Lords in the True No Holy Land, none of them have created a supreme technique, and I haven't created it either, even the 143 Legendary Realm Lords want to create a supreme technique is so difficult, and you are only half a step in the Legendary Realm!"

"Anyway, I have to give it a try, I want to know more about the supreme technique, I wonder if I can browse the records of the true holy land about the supreme technique?" Ye Tian asked.

"Yes, I'm in charge, you go to the inheritance treasure house to browse, you will become a legendary realm in the future, and the true holy land has never restricted the lord of the legendary realm. "Lord Frost Freedom said.

"Thank you, Lord Frostless. "

......

Sunrise Mountain.

The Lord of the Shaking Mountain stood in front of the white-bearded old man and said, "Master, you actually gave that kid a chance, although it was an impossible task, but it was also a chance, and those peak Legendary Realm lords asked for the Ancient Leaves of Time and Space before, master, you didn't give a chance at all!"

The white-bearded old man smiled and said, "The juniors of my friends are all waste materials, given to the Ancient Leaves of Time and Space, their hope of condensing the supreme legend body is less than one percent, and it is a waste to give them, so can those juniors pass my assessment? You should know that I have a way to be like the Eternal Master, and I can even spy on the future line of the ordinary Legendary Realm Lord, but I can't spy on the future of the Endless Lord.

The words of the white-bearded old man shocked the Lord of the Shaking Mountain. _
